content.query:
-- Create schema
CREATE SCHEMA silver;
CREATE SCHEMA gold;
CREATE SCHEMA bronze;
PRINT 'Schemas created';

-- Physical Silver table with proper distribution
CREATE TABLE silver.transactions
(
    transaction_id          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    cardholder_id           NVARCHAR(100),
    merchant_id             NVARCHAR(100),
    amount_cad              DECIMAL(18,2),
    channel                 NVARCHAR(50),
    network                 NVARCHAR(50),
    transaction_type        NVARCHAR(50),
    payment_method          NVARCHAR(50),
    response_code           NVARCHAR(10),
    is_approved             NVARCHAR(1),
    is_international        NVARCHAR(1),
    is_flagged_suspicious   NVARCHAR(1),
    processing_time_ms      BIGINT,
    ip_country              NVARCHAR(10),
    transaction_datetime    DATETIME2,
    transaction_date        DATE,
    amount_band             NVARCHAR(20),
    province                NVARCHAR(10),
    _ingested_at            DATETIME2,
    _silver_loaded_at       DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(transaction_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX,
    PARTITION (transaction_date RANGE RIGHT FOR VALUES 
        ('2026-01-01', '2026-02-01', '2026-03-01', 
         '2026-04-01', '2026-05-01', '2026-06-01'))
);

PRINT 'Silver transactions table created ✅';


-- Gold Fact Table
CREATE TABLE gold.fact_transactions
(
    transaction_id          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    cardholder_id           NVARCHAR(100),
    merchant_id             NVARCHAR(100),
    date_key                DATE,
    channel_key             NVARCHAR(50),
    amount_cad              DECIMAL(18,2),
    amount_band             NVARCHAR(20),
    transaction_type        NVARCHAR(50),
    payment_method          NVARCHAR(50),
    network                 NVARCHAR(50),
    response_code           NVARCHAR(10),
    is_approved             NVARCHAR(1),
    is_international        NVARCHAR(1),
    is_flagged_suspicious   NVARCHAR(1),
    processing_time_ms      BIGINT,
    ip_country              NVARCHAR(10),
    province                NVARCHAR(10),
    transaction_datetime    DATETIME2,
    _silver_loaded_at       DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(transaction_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- Gold Dim Date
CREATE TABLE gold.dim_date
(
    date_key        DATE            NOT NULL,
    year            INT,
    month           INT,
    day             INT,
    day_name        NVARCHAR(20),
    month_name      NVARCHAR(20),
    quarter         INT,
    is_weekend      INT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- Gold Dim Channel
CREATE TABLE gold.dim_channel
(
    channel_key         NVARCHAR(50)    NOT NULL,
    channel_name        NVARCHAR(50),
    channel_category    NVARCHAR(50)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- Gold Fraud Summary
CREATE TABLE gold.fraud_summary
(
    date                DATE,
    channel             NVARCHAR(50),
    ip_country          NVARCHAR(10),
    total_transactions  BIGINT,
    total_volume_cad    FLOAT,
    fraud_count         BIGINT,
    fraud_rate_pct      FLOAT,
    approved_count      BIGINT,
    avg_processing_ms   FLOAT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(channel),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- Gold Merchant Performance
CREATE TABLE gold.merchant_performance
(
    merchant_id             NVARCHAR(100),
    total_transactions      BIGINT,
    total_volume_cad        FLOAT,
    avg_transaction_cad     FLOAT,
    fraud_count             BIGINT,
    fraud_rate_pct          FLOAT,
    approved_count          BIGINT
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(merchant_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

PRINT 'Gold tables created ✅';

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.usp_load_transactions
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.transactions;

    INSERT INTO silver.transactions
    (
        transaction_id, cardholder_id, merchant_id,
        amount_cad, channel, network, transaction_type,
        payment_method, response_code, is_approved,
        is_international, is_flagged_suspicious,
        processing_time_ms, ip_country, transaction_datetime,
        transaction_date, amount_band, province,
        _ingested_at, _silver_loaded_at
    )
    SELECT
        transaction_id,
        cardholder_id,
        merchant_id,
        amount_cad,
        UPPER(TRIM(channel)),
        UPPER(TRIM(network)),
        UPPER(TRIM(transaction_type)),
        UPPER(TRIM(payment_method)),
        response_code,
        CASE WHEN response_code = '00' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END,
        is_international,
        is_flagged_suspicious,
        processing_time_ms,
        ip_country,
        TRY_CAST(event_timestamp AS DATETIME2),
        CAST(TRY_CAST(event_timestamp AS DATETIME2) AS DATE),
        CASE
            WHEN amount_cad < 25   THEN 'MICRO'
            WHEN amount_cad < 100  THEN 'SMALL'
            WHEN amount_cad < 500  THEN 'MEDIUM'
            WHEN amount_cad < 2000 THEN 'LARGE'
            ELSE 'VERY_LARGE'
        END,
        partition_key,
        _ingested_at,
        GETDATE()
    FROM interac_bronze.dbo.bronze_raw_transactions
    WHERE transaction_id IS NOT NULL
    AND   amount_cad > 0;

    PRINT 'Silver loaded ✅';
END

CREATE PROCEDURE gold.usp_load_gold
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ── Load fact_transactions ────────────────────────────
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.fact_transactions;
    INSERT INTO gold.fact_transactions
    SELECT
        transaction_id, cardholder_id, merchant_id,
        transaction_date, channel, amount_cad, amount_band,
        transaction_type, payment_method, network,
        response_code, is_approved, is_international,
        is_flagged_suspicious, processing_time_ms,
        ip_country, province, transaction_datetime,
        _silver_loaded_at
    FROM silver.transactions;

    -- ── Load dim_date ─────────────────────────────────────
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.dim_date;
    INSERT INTO gold.dim_date
    SELECT DISTINCT
        transaction_date,
        YEAR(transaction_date),
        MONTH(transaction_date),
        DAY(transaction_date),
        DATENAME(WEEKDAY, transaction_date),
        DATENAME(MONTH, transaction_date),
        DATEPART(QUARTER, transaction_date),
        CASE WHEN DATENAME(WEEKDAY, transaction_date)
             IN ('Saturday','Sunday') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM silver.transactions
    WHERE transaction_date IS NOT NULL;

    -- ── Load dim_channel ──────────────────────────────────
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.dim_channel;
    INSERT INTO gold.dim_channel
    SELECT DISTINCT
        channel,
        channel,
        CASE channel
            WHEN 'POS'         THEN 'In-Person'
            WHEN 'ONLINE'      THEN 'Digital'
            WHEN 'ATM'         THEN 'Self-Service'
            WHEN 'MOBILE'      THEN 'Digital'
            WHEN 'CONTACTLESS' THEN 'In-Person'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END
    FROM silver.transactions;

    -- ── Load fraud_summary ────────────────────────────────
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.fraud_summary;
    INSERT INTO gold.fraud_summary
    SELECT
        transaction_date,
        channel,
        ip_country,
        COUNT(*),
        SUM(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y'
                  THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_approved = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        AVG(CAST(processing_time_ms AS FLOAT))
    FROM silver.transactions
    GROUP BY transaction_date, channel, ip_country;

    -- ── Load merchant_performance ─────────────────────────
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.merchant_performance;
    INSERT INTO gold.merchant_performance
    SELECT
        merchant_id,
        COUNT(*),
        SUM(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        AVG(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y'
                  THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_approved = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    FROM silver.transactions
    GROUP BY merchant_id;

    PRINT 'Gold loaded ✅';
END


-- Step 1: Load Silver
EXEC silver.usp_load_transactions;

-- Step 2: Load Gold
EXEC gold.usp_load_gold;

-- Create external data source pointing to Serverless pool
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'Interac@Synapse#2024!Secure';

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL synapse_credential
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';

DROP EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE serverless_bronze;

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE serverless_bronze
WITH (
    LOCATION   = 'abfss://interac-raw@interacfabricstorage.dfs.core.windows.net',
    CREDENTIAL = synapse_credential
);

-- Drop external table and file format
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.raw_transactions;
DROP EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT json_file_format;

SELECT COUNT(*) as column_count 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'silver' 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'transactions'


DROP TABLE silver.transactions;

CREATE TABLE silver.transactions
(
    transaction_id          NVARCHAR(100),
    cardholder_id           NVARCHAR(100),
    merchant_id             NVARCHAR(100),
    amount_cad              DECIMAL(18,2),
    channel                 NVARCHAR(50),
    network                 NVARCHAR(50),
    transaction_type        NVARCHAR(50),
    payment_method          NVARCHAR(50),
    response_code           NVARCHAR(10),
    is_approved             NVARCHAR(1),
    is_international        NVARCHAR(1),
    is_flagged_suspicious   NVARCHAR(1),
    processing_time_ms      BIGINT,
    ip_country              NVARCHAR(10),
    transaction_datetime    DATETIME2,
    transaction_date        DATE,
    amount_band             NVARCHAR(20),
    province                NVARCHAR(10),
    _ingested_at            DATETIME2,
    _silver_loaded_at       DATETIME2
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(transaction_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

PRINT 'Silver table recreated ✅';

DROP TABLE silver.transactions;

CREATE TABLE silver.transactions
(
    transaction_id          NVARCHAR(100),
    cardholder_id           NVARCHAR(100),
    merchant_id             NVARCHAR(100),
    amount_cad              DECIMAL(18,2),
    channel                 NVARCHAR(50),
    network                 NVARCHAR(50),
    transaction_type        NVARCHAR(50),
    payment_method          NVARCHAR(50),
    response_code           NVARCHAR(10),
    ip_country              NVARCHAR(10),
    is_international        NVARCHAR(1),
    processing_time_ms      BIGINT,
    is_flagged_suspicious   NVARCHAR(1),
    transaction_datetime    DATETIME2,
    province                NVARCHAR(10)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(transaction_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

PRINT 'Silver table recreated with 15 columns ✅';

DROP PROCEDURE gold.usp_load_gold;

CREATE PROCEDURE gold.usp_load_gold
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Load fact_transactions
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.fact_transactions;
    INSERT INTO gold.fact_transactions
    SELECT
        transaction_id,
        cardholder_id,
        merchant_id,
        CAST(transaction_datetime AS DATE),
        channel,
        amount_cad,
        CASE
            WHEN amount_cad < 25   THEN 'MICRO'
            WHEN amount_cad < 100  THEN 'SMALL'
            WHEN amount_cad < 500  THEN 'MEDIUM'
            WHEN amount_cad < 2000 THEN 'LARGE'
            ELSE 'VERY_LARGE'
        END,
        transaction_type,
        payment_method,
        network,
        response_code,
        CASE WHEN response_code = '00' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END,
        is_international,
        is_flagged_suspicious,
        processing_time_ms,
        ip_country,
        province,
        transaction_datetime,
        GETDATE()
    FROM silver.transactions;

    -- Load dim_date
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.dim_date;
    INSERT INTO gold.dim_date
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CAST(transaction_datetime AS DATE),
        YEAR(transaction_datetime),
        MONTH(transaction_datetime),
        DAY(transaction_datetime),
        DATENAME(WEEKDAY, transaction_datetime),
        DATENAME(MONTH, transaction_datetime),
        DATEPART(QUARTER, transaction_datetime),
        CASE WHEN DATENAME(WEEKDAY, transaction_datetime)
             IN ('Saturday','Sunday') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM silver.transactions
    WHERE transaction_datetime IS NOT NULL;

    -- Load dim_channel
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.dim_channel;
    INSERT INTO gold.dim_channel
    SELECT DISTINCT
        channel,
        channel,
        CASE channel
            WHEN 'POS'         THEN 'In-Person'
            WHEN 'ONLINE'      THEN 'Digital'
            WHEN 'ATM'         THEN 'Self-Service'
            WHEN 'MOBILE'      THEN 'Digital'
            WHEN 'CONTACTLESS' THEN 'In-Person'
            ELSE 'Other'
        END
    FROM silver.transactions;

    -- Load fraud_summary
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.fraud_summary;
    INSERT INTO gold.fraud_summary
    SELECT
        CAST(transaction_datetime AS DATE),
        channel,
        ip_country,
        COUNT(*),
        SUM(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y'
                  THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),
        SUM(CASE WHEN response_code = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        AVG(CAST(processing_time_ms AS FLOAT))
    FROM silver.transactions
    GROUP BY CAST(transaction_datetime AS DATE), channel, ip_country;

    -- Load merchant_performance
    TRUNCATE TABLE gold.merchant_performance;
    INSERT INTO gold.merchant_performance
    SELECT
        merchant_id,
        COUNT(*),
        SUM(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        AVG(CAST(amount_cad AS FLOAT)),
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_flagged_suspicious = 'Y'
                  THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2),
        SUM(CASE WHEN response_code = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    FROM silver.transactions
    GROUP BY merchant_id;

    PRINT 'Gold loaded ✅';
END
